userId.description: Unique identifier for the user matching their Firebase Auth UID

photoURL.description: Profile picture URL of the user

Game.title: Game
Game.description: A self-contained tournament game session created by the admin

id.description: Unique id for the game session

name.description: The custom name of the game session chosen by the admin

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the game was created

createdBy.description: The UID of the admin user who created this game

gachaTriggered.description: Flag indicating if the game has reached 8 players and gacha has been completed

dayCounter.description: The current day number of the simulated tournament inside this game

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last simulation day run

teamsFilled.description: Flag indicating if the admin has filled/populated the 48 teams for this game

GamePlayer.title: GamePlayer
GamePlayer.description: A player registration inside a specific game session

userId.description: Unique identifier matching the user's Auth UID

name.description: Display name of the user inside this game

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user joined this game

favoritTeam.description: Name of the favorite team assigned, or null before gacha

darkHorseTeam.description: Name of the dark horse team assigned, or null before gacha

menengahAtasTeam.description: Name of the upper-middle team assigned, or null before gacha

menengahTeam.description: Name of the middle team assigned, or null before gacha

underdogKompetitifTeam.description: Name of the competitive underdog team assigned, or null before gacha

underdogBeratTeam.description: Name of the heavy underdog team assigned, or null before gacha

hasGacha.description: Indicates whether the player has received their gacha assignment

Team.title: Team
Team.description: One of the 48 competing national teams inside a specific game

points.description: Current points accumulated by the team

ownerId.description: UID of the user who owns this team, or null

ownerName.description: Name of the user who owns this team, or null

/games/{gameId}/teams/{teamId}.description: National teams competing inside a game

/games/{gameId}/players/{userId}.description: Player registrations and team assignments inside a game
